narrative:
Orange Twp township has 940 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.6 percentage points.
